summary: Nice FLAC recording praised for its clarity, though no performance details are given.
review: The single reviewer rates the recording highly, calling it a very nice capture and thanking the source. No comments on the concert’s musical performance or specific songs are provided, leaving show quality unassessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic 5‑star review mentions a very nice recording; no information on the live performance, so rating leans on recording quality alone.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the recording as "very nice," implying clear and pleasant sound despite lack of technical detail.
